coverage_window: last 24 hours from run start (2026-07-19 to 2026-07-20)
notes: Quiet day for Saudi culture-specific coverage; the cycle was dominated by a regional security escalation (Iran war; Yemen's Houthis declared a naval blockade against Saudi Arabia, Reuters 2026-07-20, corroborated by NBC News). No eligible, in-window Saudi human-rights, labour, sportswashing, PIF, academic-freedom, Mecca, or watchdog/NGO story surfaced from a non-Saudi, non-Israeli outlet. The one genuine in-window negative/reputational Saudi story (the Houthi naval blockade) is carried in the Negative Articles section, so the empty-section exception is not relied upon this edition. Multiple Israeli-outlet (jpost.com, ynetnews.com) hits were surfaced and excluded per the hard source-eligibility rule.
